textByHash.63c8e9b8044d54da83724eb149e843a0c8a13255: I... I see it! I see everything! All of her knowledge, I have it now!
textByHash.7a1b8e02ebcc96d7845f723afc7adc7cad8c6b03: It's still crazy how fast it all happened. One moment I was a daydreaming elf, who'd never even seen Prifddinas. Now I'm responsible for an entire elf clan.
textByHash.98222b08baaa432bcaec48f6f225544a5cd6f67d: I... I suppose it does. Wow!
textByHash.aa5ea47a16d821cbf9496aa6b7e9789fbc882318: Not much is fun when Lord Iorwerth is involved. If all goes well though, he won't be a problem after today.
textByHash.b683454931c89f1015ab67a2916e89c3e5a2f6d5: It's a daunting job, but I have the knowledge of my predecessor to help me.
textByHash.cb212880cc565abd7bc56996c3bae4ee43b43625: I hope we win today. It would be a bit embarrassing to be known as the shortest serving clan elder.
textByHash.e5cef491a66edf248bf849a8e5d6c311964b906c: I guess you'll be wanting me to help defend the Underground Pass then? Well don't worry, I was planning on joining you anyway. With this new knowledge, I can be an even bigger help.
textByHash.ebc930c62e98c8c12edbcc002fc8a7068703c835: I'll head there right away. Time is of the essence.
textByHash.f061c5bd2f809cb7cfe84c761cd1081b61c733bb: Yes, I know everything that she knew! The statue, it must have given it to me somehow!
